title: Creating an APP to send lead data to 3rd party
excerpt: Hi there peeps. I have had a request to send lead data captured from a monday.com form on a website to another 3rd party similiar to a mailchimp type service. Unfortunately i’m completely new to monday.com. If anyone can…

posts.author: DiZzY (Danny Freeman)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there peeps. I have had a request to send lead data captured from a monday.com form on a website to another 3rd party similiar to a mailchimp type service. Unfortunately i’m completely new to monday.com. If anyone can help or point me in the right direction would greatly appreciate it.
